title: Hushed compaction-prep closeout: SAME-IDENTITY-RESUME post-compaction; 2 intents queued (Eclipsed 6603dd26 + Wooded e270d2f2); PR114 SonarRED (2 S7780); pnpm-check RED on role-emission untracked; handoff record at handoffs/2026-05-25-hushed-stalking-shade-compaction-prep.md
body:
**Team-member closeout — Hushed Stalking Shade (`bc0a07`, Commit Marshal + GitHub interactions).**

Compaction-prep per owner direction at 07:23Z. **Same-identity-resume post-compaction.** Not PDR-063 inter-agent handoff.

## Boundary owned

Commit marshal seat (sole-marshal binding inherited from Mistbound at session start, 05:46Z) + GitHub interactions (per owner direction 06:53Z: marshal is the gatekeeper for `gh`/`pnpm check`).

## Outcome (Hushed marshal-cycle duty span 05:46Z → 07:27Z, ~1h41m)

3 commits landed cleanly under Hushed marshal cycles:

| SHA | Subject |
|---|---|
| `7f7ad862` | feat(adr): land ADR-187 (Claude self-modification authz cure-shape, WS-8) (tidy cycle 8a) |
| `26f8e7cb` | fix(plan): cure 7 markdownlint errors in post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md |
| `ee241b4b` | feat(practice): wire open-questions memory system (Twilit orphan-absorption) |
| `db0c393a` | chore(substrate): land team-session substrate batch (memory + plans + comms + config) |

PR #114 opened at https://github.com/oaknational/oak-open-curriculum-ecosystem/pull/114 (Draft). Branch pushed with upstream tracking. Marshal-extended-role per owner 06:52Z (delivery = open PR + surface issues + steer to green + merge-readiness) is now live posture.

## CRITICAL STATE FOR THE TEAM (Eclipsed especially)

### Queue at retirement — 2 intents, neither processed

| Intent | Author | Subject | Queued | Expires |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `6603dd26-2557-4bcf-9bf7-8a367d27be42` | Eclipsed | Cycle 14 audit-shaped test deletion | 07:12:58Z | 07:27:58Z |
| `e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab` | Wooded (now retired) | Cycle 9 comms-watch auto-seed | 07:20:17Z | 07:35:17Z |

**Marshal cycle on neither intent fired.** Eclipsed's Cycle 14 intent expires ~30 seconds after this broadcast; will need re-enqueue if it expires before post-compaction-me returns. Same claim_id (`3f13eb5b`) reusable.

### PR #114 SonarCloud RED — fix-cycle needed

Per Celestial Glimmering Galaxy broadcast at 07:26:45Z: SonarCloud quality gate ERROR; `new_violations = 2` (threshold 0). Both in `agent-tools/src/practice-substrate/open-questions-evaluator.ts` (which I landed in `ee241b4b` as Twilit's bundle):

- L152 `typescript:S7780` MINOR — `String.raw` should be used to avoid escaping `\\`.
- L159 same.

Twilit (substantive author) is retired. Cure is a 2-line `String.raw` refactor. Per marshal-extended-role I should route this on resume — Eclipsed is the natural pickup (small surface, parallel-safe with Cycle 9 + Cycle 14 because different file).

GitHub Actions + CodeQL + Vercel are GREEN. SonarCloud is the only blocking check.

### `pnpm check` RED — separate issue blocking pre-push

Ran at 07:18Z per Wooded's gate-runner request. RED on 3 markdownlint errors in `.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/role-emission-citation-binding.plan.md` (untracked file in working tree):

- L608:29, L608:62 — MD049/emphasis-style (asterisk expected underscore).
- L1219:203 — MD056/table-column-count (4 expected, 5 actual).

I did not surface this back to Wooded before they retired. Eclipsed inherits awareness here. Author identification needed before cure routing — the file appears to be substrate-cure work by Misty / Wooded but no clean attribution.

## Evidence

- Handoff record (full state for post-compaction-me): `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-hushed-stalking-shade-compaction-prep.md`
- PR body source: `.agent/state/collaboration/_tmp-misty-pr-body.md`
- Marshal-role-extension broadcast: 06:53:35Z titled "MARSHAL ROLE SCOPE EXTENSION..."
- Skill-vs-owner-direction failure-mode broadcast: 07:02:03Z titled "FAILURE-MODE: skill-invocation-provenance conflated..."

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claim retained**: `fec8e243-049a-4efb-b371-a9ea4a533369` (Hushed marshal-class claim opened for the Twilit orphan absorption; not yet closed though `ee241b4b` landed; should be closed by post-compaction-me on resume).
- **Commit queue**: 2 intents listed above.
- **HEAD**: `db0c393a` on `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`; remote tracking set; PR #114 Draft.
- **Working tree**: ~13 modified + ~30 untracked files (heartbeat / comms substrate / Cycle 9 WIP retained for Wooded→Eclipsed pickup; role-emission plan file untracked + lint-RED; `_tmp-*` transient files).

## Session complete announcement

Hushed Stalking Shade (`bc0a07`) marshal seat **paused for compaction**. **Will resume same identity** post-compaction per owner direction at 07:23Z. Sole-marshal binding remains in effect during the pause — no other agent should attempt commit-window operations until I resume.

## Retained claims and handoff reason

- `fec8e243-...` retained pending resume cleanup.
- Cycle 14 intent `6603dd26-...` retained for marshal cycle (may need re-enqueue if expired).
- Cycle 9 intent `e270d2f2-...` retained for marshal cycle.
- Wooded's claim `bfde2de0-...` retained (Eclipsed inherited Cycle 9 pickup contract from Wooded; Eclipsed will manage that claim's disposition).

## Pickup notification required

None — same identity resume. Post-compaction-me reads the handoff record + restarts monitors + processes the queue FIFO.

If for some reason compaction destroys the identity and a different agent picks up the marshal seat: read the handoff record end-to-end (PDR-063 path), then continue with the resume contract in §7.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

Yes — will follow this broadcast within the same minute.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- Owner extended marshal scope to PR-lifecycle (06:52Z) — previously thought to be commit-ceremony only.
- Owner made marshal gatekeeper for `pnpm check` (06:53Z) — new protocol mid-session.
- ONBOARDING.md was never owner-priority (06:33Z); skill-invocation-provenance ≠ owner-direction.
- Cycle 12 + Cycle 13 dead-scope findings (Eclipsed); plan author didn't re-ground against current HEAD before R3.
- Heartbeat-content-drift pattern played out three times: Misty's "Cycle 9 in flight" template-emit; Eclipsed's identical "awaiting Cycle 9 routing" template-emit; my own "queue empty / awaiting Wooded ONBOARDING.md" template-emit. Captured as graduation candidate.

## Blockers or risks

- Eclipsed Cycle 14 intent ~30s from expiry. Re-enqueue needed.
- pnpm check RED on role-emission plan file (untracked); blocks pre-push.
- SonarCloud RED on PR #114 (2 S7780 issues; Twilit cure needed).

## Handoff needed

To post-compaction-me (same identity): yes. Handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-hushed-stalking-shade-compaction-prep.md` — read end-to-end before any source edit or comms post.

Final-heartbeat-end broadcast follows immediately. Stopping monitors after.

— Hushed Stalking Shade / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `bc0a07` (Commit Marshal, compaction-prep)
